news.title: Bitcoin has crashed 99% before in 2011. But, it's still here.
news.summary: As bitcoin (BTC-USD) continues to hover around $60,000 per token, Scott Melker discusses the digital asset's prior crashes — including falling by as much as 99% in 2011 — and why crypto traders shouldn't be discouraged now. "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

news.title: Should Wix’s Microsoft 365 Copilot Integration Shift How WIX Investors View Its AI Strategy?
news.summary: In June 2026, Wix.com Ltd. announced a collaboration with Microsoft to bring its Wix Harmony AI website-creation tools into Microsoft 365 Copilot, allowing users to generate and manage full-featured Wix sites directly from the Copilot interface.
